    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    W

    Workout - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.model
    Represents a single workout entry in the WorkoutLog application.
    Workout(String, int, String, Intensity, boolean, boolean, String) - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Creates a new Workout with all required information.
    WorkoutFormEvent - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    Carries the data the user entered in the input form when the "Add Workout" button is pressed.
    WorkoutFormEvent(Object) - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Creates a new form event.
    WorkoutFormListener - Interface in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    Listens for the "add workout" action coming from the input form panel.
    workoutList - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    List component showing all logged workouts.
    WorkoutListListener - Interface in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    Listens for the "delete workout" action coming from the workout list panel.
    WorkoutListPanel - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    The right-hand View component: shows the list of all logged workouts and a statistics summary below it, plus a button to delete the selected workout.
    WorkoutListPanel() - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    Builds the list panel.
    workoutLog - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.MainWindow
    The workout log that holds all workout data (the model).
    WorkoutLog - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic
    Manages the list of all recorded workouts.
    WorkoutLog() - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Creates a new, empty WorkoutLog.
    workouts - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Internal storage for all workout entries.
    WorkoutToolBar - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    The toolbar with quick-access file buttons (Save, Load, Export).
    WorkoutToolBar() - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutToolBar
    Builds the toolbar.
